sentences.target: Mon oncle joue un marquis dans la série.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃n ɔ̃kl ʒu‿œ̃ maʁki dɑ̃ la seʁi/

translations.fr: Mon oncle joue un marquis dans la série.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃n ɔ̃kl ʒu‿œ̃ maʁki dɑ̃ la seʁi/
translations.en: My uncle plays a marquis in the show.
translations.es: Mi tío hace de marqués en la serie.
translations.de: Mein Onkel spielt in der Serie einen Marquis.
translations.it: Mio zio interpreta un marchese nella serie.
translations.zh-Hans: 我叔叔在剧里扮演一位侯爵。
translations.yue: 我叔叔喺套劇入面扮演一位侯爵。
translations.ru: Мой дядя играет маркиза в сериале.
translations.pt: Meu tio interpreta um marquês na série.
translations.vi: Chú tôi đóng vai một hầu tước trong phim.
translations.ar: عمي يلعب دور ماركيز في المسلسل.
translations.nl: Mijn oom speelt een markies in de serie.
translations.uk: Мій дядько грає маркіза в серіалі.
translations.hu: A nagybátyám egy márkit alakít a sorozatban.
translations.hi: मेरे चाचा धारावाहिक में एक मार्क्विस की भूमिका निभा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Mój wujek gra markiza w serialu.
translations.el: Ο θείος μου υποδύεται έναν μαρκήσιο στη σειρά.
translations.nb: Onkelen min spiller en marki i serien.
translations.id: Pamanku memerankan seorang markis di serial itu.
translations.sv: Min farbror spelar en markis i serien.
translations.ro: Unchiul meu joacă rolul unui marchiz în serial.
translations.cs: Můj strýc hraje v seriálu markýze.
translations.da: Min onkel spiller en markis i serien.
translations.ja: 叔父はドラマで侯爵を演じています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies the noun 'oncle' to mark possession.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP 'Mon oncle' and agrees with the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'oncle'. Means 'to play (act)'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun 'marquis'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'joue' (the role being acted).
Preposition introducing a locative PP 'dans la série' that modifies the clause (setting).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for the noun 'série'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP object of 'dans' (location).

sentences.target: Tu connais le marquis du château voisin.

translations.fr: Tu connais le marquis du château voisin.
translations.en: You know the marquis from the nearby castle.
translations.es: Conoces al marqués del castillo cercano.
translations.de: Du kennst den Marquis vom nahegelegenen Schloss.
translations.it: Conosci il marchese del castello vicino.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识附近城堡的侯爵。
translations.yue: 你識附近嗰座城堡嘅侯爵。
translations.ru: Ты знаешь маркиза из соседнего замка.
translations.pt: Você conhece o marquês do castelo vizinho.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את המרקיז מהטירה הסמוכה.
translations.vi: Bạn biết vị hầu tước ở lâu đài gần đó.
translations.ar: أنت تعرف الماركيز من القلعة القريبة.
translations.nl: Jij kent de markies van het nabijgelegen kasteel.
translations.uk: Ти знаєш маркіза з сусіднього замку.
translations.hi: तुम पास के किले के मार्क्विस को जानते हो.
translations.el: Γνωρίζεις τον μαρκήσιο από το κοντινό κάστρο.
translations.nb: Du kjenner markien fra slottet i nærheten.
translations.id: Kamu kenal markis dari kastil terdekat.
translations.sv: Du känner markisen från slottet i närheten.
translations.ro: Îl cunoști pe marchizul de la castelul din apropiere.
translations.da: Du kender markisen fra slottet i nærheden.
translations.ja: 近くの城の侯爵を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb 'connais'.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes 'le marquis' as its direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'marquis'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'connais'.
Fused preposition-article (contraction of 'de' + 'le'); introduces a genitive/complement PP linking 'marquis' to 'château voisin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the PP complement 'du château voisin' modifying 'marquis'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; post-nominal modifier of 'château'.

sentences.target: Je lis un roman sur un marquis.

translations.fr: Je lis un roman sur un marquis.
translations.en: I'm reading a novel about a marquis.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo una novela sobre un marqués.
translations.de: Ich lese einen Roman über einen Marquis.
translations.it: Sto leggendo un romanzo su un marchese.
translations.ko: 저는 후작에 관한 소설을 읽고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在读一本关于一位侯爵的小说。
translations.yue: 我喺度睇一本關於一位侯爵嘅小說。
translations.pt: Estou lendo um romance sobre um marquês.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một cuốn tiểu thuyết về một vị hầu tước.
translations.nl: Ik lees een roman over een markies.
translations.hi: मैं एक मार्क्विस के बारे में उपन्यास पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διαβάζω ένα μυθιστόρημα για έναν μαρκήσιο.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en roman om en marki.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca sebuah novel tentang seorang markis.
translations.sv: Jag läser en roman om en markis.
translations.ro: Citesc un roman despre un marchiz.
translations.da: Jeg læser en roman om en markis.
translations.ja: 私は侯爵についての小説を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'lis'.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'un roman' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'roman'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'lis'.
Preposition introducing a PP that specifies the topic/content ('sur un marquis') modifying 'roman'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'marquis' within the PP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the PP complement of 'sur' indicating the subject matter.

sentences.target: Ils se déguisent en marquis pour la fête.
sentences.reading: /il sə deɡiz ɑ̃‿maʁki puʁ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Ils se déguisent en marquis pour la fête.
translations.ipa: /il sə deɡiz ɑ̃‿maʁki puʁ la fɛt/
translations.en: They dress up as marquises for the party.
translations.es: Se disfrazan de marqueses para la fiesta.
translations.de: Sie verkleiden sich als Marquis für die Party.
translations.it: Si travestono da marchesi per la festa.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们为了派对打扮成侯爵。
translations.yue: 佢哋為咗個派對扮成侯爵。
translations.pt: Eles se fantasiam de marqueses para a festa.
translations.vi: Họ hóa trang thành các hầu tước cho bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ze verkleden zich als markiezen voor het feest.
translations.uk: Вони переодягаються в маркізів на вечірку.
translations.hi: वे पार्टी के लिए मार्क्विस के भेष में तैयार होते हैं.
translations.pl: Przebierają się za markizów na imprezę.
translations.el: Μεταμφιέζονται σε μαρκήδες για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: De kler seg ut som markier til festen.
translations.id: Mereka berdandan sebagai para markis untuk pesta.
translations.sv: De klär ut sig till markiser för festen.
translations.ro: Se costumează în marchizi pentru petrecere.
translations.cs: Na večírek se převlékají za markýze.
translations.da: De klæder sig ud som markiser til festen.
translations.ja: 彼らはパーティーのために侯爵に仮装する。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine default); subject of 'déguisent'.
Clitic reflexive pronoun; forms the pronominal verb 'se déguiser' and marks that the action is performed on the subject.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Ils' and used pronominally with 'se'.
Preposition indicating resulting role/state; introduces the complement 'marquis' (they dress up as marquises).
Common noun, masculine (invariable in plural in form); complement of 'en' denoting the role adopted.
Preposition introducing a purpose PP 'pour la fête' that modifies the clause.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'fête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the PP object of 'pour' (purpose).

मैं एक मार्क्विस के बारे में उपन्यास पढ़ रहा हूँ.
वे पार्टी के लिए मार्क्विस के भेष में तैयार होते हैं.
pl: Mój wujek gra markiza w serialu.
Przebierają się za markizów na imprezę.

Jeg leser en roman om en marki.

Kamu kenal markis dari kastil terdekat.

Îl cunoști pe marchizul de la castelul din apropiere.
Citesc un roman despre un marchiz.
Se costumează în marchizi pentru petrecere.
cs: Můj strýc hraje v seriálu markýze.
Na večírek se převlékají za markýze.

Du kender markisen fra slottet i nærheden.
